name: Persian cucumbers
why_now: Small, seedless, and thin-skinned, Persian cucumbers are at their crispest in summer. They need no peeling and almost no preparation.
buy_this_much: 4–6 cucumbers for one person for the week
price_note: Trader Joe's sells a bag of six for around $2. One of the best deals in the basket.

flavor_paths.name: Lime + mint
flavor_paths.description: Lime juice, flaky salt, fresh mint. Cool and bright.

flavor_paths.name: Yogurt + garlic
flavor_paths.description: Greek yogurt, garlic, a little olive oil. Works as a side or a sauce.

flavor_paths.name: Chili crisp + sesame
flavor_paths.description: Soy, sesame, chili crisp. Good on rice bowls and noodles.

weekday_uses: Quick salad with tomato and basil
Wrap filling with chicken and yogurt
weekend_use: Smashed cucumber salad with sesame, chili crisp, and scallion.
storage: Refrigerate in a loose bag. Use within one week. Best used early in the week.
one_thing_to_learn: Salt briefly before dressing and let the water draw out for a few minutes. The cucumber becomes more concentrated and holds its crunch longer.
market_question: Where did these come from this week?
